channel.title: Thorpe Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Thorpe Family History

item.title: Agent Handoff — Phase 1B
item.description: Phase 1B Handoff: Shared Intake Batch-1 Ingestion Overview This phase moved from reconnaissance into actionable ingestion by staging high-value shared-intake files into References/raw/inbox/2026-04-22-intake/, creating text-first reference notes, and adding initial person pages constrained to source...

item.title: Amy E Critton
item.description: Amy E Critton Biographical Profile Name: Amy E Critton Role in this project: Miller-line ancestor represented in repeated Walnut Township, Ohio census-summary entries.

item.title: Andrew Ault
item.description: Andrew Ault Biographical Profile Name: Andrew Ault Role in this project: Direct ancestor listed in the census-summary index and early US census table extracts.

item.title: Angeline Caswell
item.description: Angeline Caswell Biographical Profile Name: Angeline Caswell Role in this project: Bangle-linked ancestor represented in 1860-1900 census-summary entries.

item.title: Catherine Filkins
item.description: Catherine Filkins Biographical Profile Name: Catherine Filkins Role in this project: Johnson/Spicer-linked ancestor represented in 1850 and 1860 New York census-summary entries.

item.title: Elizabeth Brooks
item.description: Elizabeth Brooks Biographical Profile Name: Elizabeth Brooks Role in this project: Direct ancestor indexed in census-summary entries with Ault-linked household overlap.

item.title: Elizabeth Harrison
item.description: Elizabeth Harrison Biographical Profile Name: Elizabeth Harrison Role in this project: Tallman-linked ancestor represented in 1850 Ohio census-summary extraction.

item.title: Elizabeth How
item.description: Elizabeth How Biographical Profile Name: Elizabeth How Role in this project: Munson-line ancestor represented in 1841 Essex census-summary extraction.

item.title: Elizabeth Maria Bangle
item.description: Elizabeth Maria Bangle Biographical Profile Name: Elizabeth Maria Bangle Role in this project: Direct ancestor indexed in census-summary pages with Bangle and Palmer-linked household entries.

item.title: Elizabeth Plomey Ault
item.description: Elizabeth Plomey Ault Biographical Profile Name: Elizabeth Plomey Ault Role in this project: Direct ancestor with multi-decade US census entries in the census summary.
